# AC MOD PARAGON

[English](README.md)


## What it does

When you kill creatures at maximum level you will get paragon xp. Increasing your paragon level give you additional stat points you can allocate.
The mod is including the lua/aio for an client interface to allocate these points.
Data for the mod is stored in a new table in the character db.


## How to install

1. Import SQL to your DB
2. Set up AIO for your server
3. Copy patches and AIO to the client
4. Add the module to your core and compile

## Licensing

Feel free to copy or edit the code. I dont care if you give credits or not, have fun.
